text: Which ship shall be provided with International Shore Connection for supply of water as Extinguishing agent?

options.text: B) All ship of 500 GT and above
C) Passenger ship carrying more than 500 person
D) Passenger ship of 1000 person and above

explanation: SOLAS regulations require that all ships of 500 GT and above be provided with an International Shore Connection. This facilitates the supply of water from shore-based fire fighting appliances to the ship's fixed fire main.
